basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Scientist, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant disciplines, MTech/MSc/BTech with experience
qualification.details: Research Scientist: Ph.D. in Chemistry/Physics/Chemical Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/Energy Engineering/Renewable Energy or MTech with 3 years experience. Technical Officer/Manager (Technical): MTech/MSc/BTech with relevant experience. Business Development Manager: BTech/MSc/MBA/BCom with relevant experience. Research Associate (RA-I/RA-II/RA-III): PhD or MTech with research experience. Project Assistant (PA-I/PA-II): MTech/MSc/BE/BTech with relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Research Scientist: INR 0.70 lakh to 1.20 lakh per month Technical Officer/Manager (Technical): INR 0.60 lakh to 1.00 lakh per month Business Development Manager: INR 0.80 lakh to 1.5 lakh per month Research Associate (RA-I/RA-II/RA-III): Rs. 0.60 lakh - 1.5 lakh Per Month Project Assistant (PA-I/PA-II): Rs. 0.60 lakh - 1.5 lakh Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Bhubaneswar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the email application for the IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 is 28th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IIT Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: IIT Bhubaneswar has announced a total of 2 vacancies for various posts, including Technical Officer/Manager and Business Development Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Scientist post?
faq.answer: For the Research Scientist position, candidates need a Ph.D. in relevant disciplines like Chemistry, Physics, or Engineering, or an MTech with 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the posts advertised?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by IIT Bhubaneswar is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for these positions via email by sending their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 0.60 lakh to Rs. 1.5 lakh per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection methods for IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state is IIT Bhubaneswar located in?
faq.answer: IIT Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contract-based.
